title: Minimum Field Repetition
text: Minimum Field Repetition The minimum number of subfield repetitions allowed in the field. The default assumes one repetition, that is, a field that contains no subfields. Value Description True Sets the Min value of the REP( Min - Max ) field syntax code. False Equivalent to REP(1-1) The default assumes one repetition, that is, a field that contains no subfields. Applies To Field Syntax Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
